name: earthsync
description: Open-source citizen science platform for distributed Schumann Resonance monitoring

scripts.typecheck:python: cd server && uv run pyright src/ && cd ../simulator && uv run pyright src/ && cd ../firmware && uv run pyright src/
scripts.security:python: cd server && uv run bandit -r src/ -c ../bandit.yaml
scripts.dead-code: cd server && uv run vulture src/ ../vulture_whitelist.py --min-confidence 80
